summary: Completed testing of LiveKit WebRTC and Plaid bank linking integration features. All backend APIs and frontend Control Panel UI working correctly.
passed_tests: API: GET /api/plaid/status returns configured=false, environment='sandbox', and message about adding API keys (200)
API: POST /api/plaid/create-link-token requires authentication (401)
API: POST /api/plaid/create-link-token works for creator role, returns mock response when not configured (200)
API: GET /api/livekit/stream-status/{event_id} returns livekit_configured=false flag (200)
API: GET /api/livekit/stream-status/{event_id} returns event_id, status, is_live, viewer_count (200)
API: GET /api/livekit/stream-status/{event_id} returns 404 for invalid event
API: POST /api/livekit/join-as-creator requires authentication (401)
API: POST /api/livekit/join-as-creator returns room_name, token, url, can_publish for creator (200)
API: POST /api/livekit/join-as-creator returns 404 for invalid event
API: POST /api/livekit/join-as-viewer requires authentication (401)
API: POST /api/livekit/end-stream/{event_id} requires authentication (401)
API: GET /api/events returns events list for homepage (200)
API: POST /api/admin/login works with admin@showmelive.com / admin123 (200)
API: GET /api/admin/dashboard requires admin authentication (401)
Homepage loads for guests with events carousel and ShowMeLive branding
Admin panel login works at /admin/login
Admin dashboard shows Overview, Users, Events, Tickets, Live, Bank tabs
Control Panel page loads at /control-panel/{eventId}
Control Panel shows LiveKit configuration warning banner when not configured
Control Panel shows correct warning message: 'LiveKit not configured. Add LIVEKIT_URL, LIVEKIT_API_KEY, and LIVEKIT_API_SECRET to .env for real streaming.'
Control Panel shows Start Stream button (green)
Control Panel shows camera switch buttons (Cam 1-5 for premium)
Control Panel shows Mic Volume controls with slider and mute button
Control Panel shows Speaker controls with volume slider, Treble, and Bass
Control Panel shows Video Transition options (Cut, Fade, Crossfade)
Control Panel shows Camera Previews sidebar
Control Panel shows PRO badge for premium package
Control Panel shows viewers counter (0 viewers)
Control Panel shows Settings button
Control Panel shows Connect Device button
seed_data_creation: Created test creator user with session and test event with premium streaming package for Control Panel testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: LiveKit WebRTC and Plaid bank linking integrations are set up and ready for API keys. Both return proper status when not configured. Control Panel shows warning banner when LiveKit is not configured. Key endpoints: GET /api/plaid/status (returns configured flag), GET /api/livekit/stream-status/{event_id} (returns livekit_configured flag). Control Panel UI has all streaming controls: camera switching, mic volume, speaker controls, video transitions.

mocked_apis.livekit_webrtc: MOCKED - Ready for API keys. Returns mock tokens when LIVEKIT_API_KEY and LIVEKIT_API_SECRET not configured. Add LIVEKIT_URL, LIVEKIT_API_KEY, LIVEKIT_API_SECRET to backend/.env for real streaming.
mocked_apis.plaid_bank_linking: MOCKED - Ready for API keys. Returns mock response when PLAID_CLIENT_ID and PLAID_SECRET not configured. Add PLAID_CLIENT_ID, PLAID_SECRET, PLAID_ENV to backend/.env for real bank linking.
